creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 188688
Patch 1 from 2 for math/saga to work with x11-toolkits/wxgtk30 3.0.3.1

As described in bug #223758, comment #5, there is already an upstream patch for SAGA GIS trunk version. This will land in release version > 6.1.0, this may take some time. Until than, these changes should be applied to the SAGA GIS port (math/saga) via two patches for the files dir.
